tools.name: get_scheduler_run_log
tools.description: Return ordered scheduled run timeline from SQLite without collecting new snapshots.

storage_path.description: SQLite file path produced by schedule_tracker_summary.
storage_path.title: Storage Path

job_id.description: Optional scheduler job id. When omitted, the latest stored job is used.
job_id.title: Job Id

tools.name: get_tracker_summary
tools.description: Return aggregated summary from persisted Tracker snapshots.

storage_path.description: SQLite file path produced by schedule_tracker_summary.
storage_path.title: Storage Path

tools.name: schedule_tracker_summary
tools.description: Run scheduled mock Tracker collection and persist snapshots in SQLite.

issue_keys.description: Mock Tracker issue keys to collect, for example AI-16 AI-17 AI-18.
issue_keys.title: Issue Keys

storage_path.description: SQLite file path used for scheduler persistence.
storage_path.title: Storage Path

interval_seconds.description: Delay between collection runs in seconds; use 5 for video/demo.
interval_seconds.title: Interval Seconds

max_runs.description: Number of bounded runs. Null means run until cancelled.
max_runs.title: Max Runs
